title: Junior Business Development Manager at Liases Foras

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Liases Foras
jsonLd.description:
Liases Foras, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Thane operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Liases Foras:
Liases Foras is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Liases Foras!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
